══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aven — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aven — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 18 damage. Aven — Iron Concentration HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Aven — Iron Concentration HP: 32/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 32/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 32/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aven — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aven — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Aven — Iron Concentration HP: 17/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):7+8=15 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Aven — Iron Concentration HP: 5/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):19+8=27 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Aven — Iron Concentration --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aven — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
